sutta: in the next 4 sutas are all very important sutas talking about the fears in the future fears in the way in the future the first 1 is 5.8.77 the buddha said monks there are these 5 fears in the way from contemplating which the earnest ardent resolute monk forest gone ought to live just to attain the unattained to master the unmastered to realize the unrealized what 5 take the case of a monk forest gone who reflects thus i am now quite alone in the forest and living here alone a snake may bite me a scorpion may bite me or a centipede may bite me and cause my death and that would be a hindrance to me before now i will put forth energy to attain the unattained to master the unmastered to realize the unrealized monks this is the first fear in the way from contemplating which the earnest arden resolute monk for his gone ought to live just to attain the unattained to master the unmastered to realize the unrealized again he reflects i may stumble and fall the food i have eaten may make me ill bile may convulse me phlegm choke me win within the step and shake me and cause my death and that would be a hindrance to me behold now i will put forth energy monks this is a second fear in the way again he reflects and i consort with fearsome creatures lion tiger leopard bear and hyena they may take my life and cause my death and that would be a hindrance to me before now i will put forth energy monks this is the third fear in the way again he reflects and i consult with thieves who either have done their deed or go about to do it they may take my life and cause my death and that would be a hindrance to me behold now i will put forth energy monks this is the fourth fear in the way moreover monks the monk forest gone reflects thus i am now alone in the forest and there are fearsome non-humans here they may take my life and caused my death and that would be a hindrance to me behold now i will put forth energy to attain the unattained to master the unmastered to realize the unrealized monks this is the fifth year in the way of contemplating which the earnest arden resolute monk forest gone ought to live just to attain the unattained to master the unmastered to realize the unrealized monks these are the 5 years in the way that's the end of the suta
commentary:
here this is about the contemplation on death which a person who is serious about the spiritual path should always make because the buddha said the body is like a cancer as though we have cancer we have a very limited time left and we don't know when we are going to pass away but pass away we definitely will so it is good to contemplate now and then that there are very many ways by which we could suddenly pass away in this case the monk is contemplating that his death might be due to creeping creatures or to other animals or accident may happen ortiz may or bandits may kill him or spirits may take his life so in the same way even for us now in this present age we should make the contemplation almost every day we are on the road driving a car or being driven an accident could happen especially if you travel long distance on a highway when you go on the fast lane and sometimes in the house we use electrical appliances you might get an electric shock nowadays there's so much cancer and other serious diseases and the incidence is very high like 1 in 5 people and we have to contemplate now that we might be having cancer in our body and yet we don't know now and might surface in 1 or 2 years so all these things we have to contemplate to remind us that death is just by the side very soon the cold fingers of death will touch us so we always have to make this contemplation


===== SOURCE: 046_Anguttara Nikaya Book 5G 5878 - 5988 by Bhante Hye Dhammavuddho Mahathera.txt =====

items: a scorpion may bite me or a centipede may bite me and cause my death
i may stumble and fall the food i have eaten may make me ill bile may convulse me phlegm choke me win within the step and shake me and cause my death
i consort with fearsome creatures lion tiger leopard bear and hyena they may take my life and cause my death
i consult with thieves who either have done their deed or go about to do it they may take my life and cause my death
